Title: Authorizes a distinctive "Honor Flight" license plate; establishes the Honor Flight fund
Summary: Authorizes a distinctive "Honor Flight" license plate; establishes the Honor Flight fund.
LawCode: Add §404-ff, V & T L; add §97-ss, St Fin L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the vehicle and traffic law, in relation to authorizing a distinctive "Honor Flight" license plate; and to amend the state finance law, in relation to establishing the Honor Flight fund
